_comment: Return-history proxies. When a fund's ann_5y or ann_10y is null in fund_snapshots (typically a newly-launched SGD share class), the fact-sheet builder falls back to the proxy ISIN's returns. Convention: proxy is a longer-history share class of the same underlying strategy (USD Acc → SGD Acc, or a sibling MAS-coded SG fund tracking the same index).

LU2420245917.reason: Amundi Idx MSCI World A12S-C SGD (2022 inception) → Infinity Global Stock Index USD (2003 inception, both track MSCI World)

IE00BF20L986.reason: Dimensional Global Targeted Value SGD Acc → USD Acc (2008 inception)

IE00BF20LB02.reason: Dimensional EM LrgCap Core Equity SGD Acc → USD Acc (2016 inception)

IE00BF20L879.reason: Dimensional Global Core Equity SGD Acc → USD Acc (2008 inception)
